summary: Add mcp serve subcommand on the main CLI that execs the standalone exchangerate-api-pp-mcp binary. Documents PATH-substitution risk in --help; --bin overrides for hardened deployments.
reason: research.json declared mcp serve as a novel feature, so users expect to invoke exchangerate-api-pp-cli mcp serve in MCP host configs. Cannot embed mcp tools in-process because internal/mcp imports internal/cli (cobratree walker), so direct embed creates an import cycle. Subprocess exec is the clean workaround. --json detection short-circuits to a friendly envelope rather than streaming MCP wire frames.
validated_outcome: mcp serve --help shows --bin override and PATH-substitution note; subprocess discovery prefers sibling of os.Executable before $PATH. mcp serve --json returns clean envelope without starting the server (fixes dogfood --json fidelity probe).
